stemHtml: If a pilot forgets to close the ATS flight plan and 30 minutes have passed since the estimated arrival time of the aircraft, what will be the result?

options.a: ATC service would be disrupted and It will start an expensive search and rescue without a reason.
options.c: Closing the flight plan is a kind of good airmanship, so there's no further action if the pilot don't close the flight plan.
options.d: ATC will call the pilot to close the flight plan and there will not be any further action.
